title: <color=#ff3b22>FPVTools Updated!</color>
body: What's New on 2.0.3? ✅Added Smoothing system for camera Three configurable sliders in the menu: >Position: Positional movement smoothing >Rotation: Rotation/orientation smoothing >Snap to Object: Auto-adjustment to selected object ⚠️Note: The Snap slider doesn't work very well for now. It's recommended to keep it at 0. I'll keep investigating and improving its functionality in future versions. ✅ This fancy notification system >Only to notify of important changes. You can disable this notifications on KSL menu. Test
